_doc: Gate-writer census ratchet (eng plan S2-PR4 / errata C(iii)). CI fails if the AST census over renquant-pipeline/src exceeds max_buy_blocked_writers. Retirement PRs TIGHTEN this number; it never grows. Authority: renquant_orchestrator.engineering_census.
_floor_doc: 3 = the designated job-boundary choke points (one per pipeline with gates). errata C(iii) COMPLETE for the pipeline repo as of #128: every gate submits to the GateRegistry; only the aggregate-application points write buy_blocked.
